slides.text: 5 things you didn't know Claude could do
slides.sub: Everyone's searching 'what is Claude used for' right now. Here's the answer.
Drop in a contract, a manual, a lease. Then just ask: 'what should I be worried about in here?'

slides.text: Builds working apps from one sentence
slides.sub: 'Build me a tip calculator with a dark theme.' It appears. It works. No code knowledge needed.
Sorted, deduped, formatted — and it explains every change it made.
Paste 3 of your old emails. It learns your tone and drafts replies that sound like you.

slides.text: It can now use your browser FOR you
slides.sub: Research, forms, comparisons — Claude clicks so you don't have to. (Full video on my page.)
Follow @techyai_cj — one 'things you didn't know' drop every week.
